title: Chain 1/8: Find a Seat
scene: 周六下午，咖啡馆很满，你问店员有没有位。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 还有空位吗？我想待一会儿。
turns.en: Any seats available? I'd like to stay a while.

turns.cn: 靠墙高脚桌刚空出来，有插座。
turns.en: A high-top by the wall just opened. It has an outlet.
Perfect. I'll drop my bag there first.
Order at the counter when you're ready.
Be right there.

title: Chain 2/8: Order Coffee
scene: 你在柜台点咖啡。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.en: Hi there! What can I get for you today?

turns.cn: 一杯大杯拿铁，燕麦奶，少冰。
turns.en: A grande latte with oat milk, light ice.
Would you like any syrup in that?
Vanilla syrup, please.
For here or to go?
For here, thanks.

title: Chain 3/8: Wrong Drink
scene: 叫到你的名字，发现拿铁做成了全脂奶。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 不好意思，我点的是燕麦奶。
turns.en: Sorry, I ordered oat milk.
My apologies. I'll remake it.
No rush.
Two minutes. Please wait nearby.
Okay. Thank you.

title: Chain 4/8: Work on Laptop
scene: 你用笔记本工作，需要连 Wi-Fi。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.en: What's the Wi-Fi password?

turns.cn: 印在收据上，用户名是店名。
turns.en: It's on your receipt. Username is the shop name.

turns.cn: 插座能用吗？要待两小时。
turns.en: Is the outlet okay to use? I'll be here about two hours.

turns.cn: 没问题，高峰时段请分享座位。
turns.en: Sure. During rush hour, please share the table.
Got it. Thanks.

title: Chain 5/8: Order a Pastry
scene: 工作一会儿，你想加个蓝莓司康。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 能再加一个蓝莓司康吗？
turns.en: Can I add a blueberry scone?
Want it warmed up?

turns.cn: 加热，再来一杯美式续杯。
turns.en: Yes, please. And a refill on my Americano.

turns.cn: 续杯一块五，一共四块八。
turns.en: Refill is a dollar fifty. Four eighty total.
Card, please. Thanks.

title: Chain 6/8: Friend Arrives
scene: 朋友如约来咖啡馆见面。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.en: Hey! Long time no see!
I know! How have you been?
Pretty good. I just started a new job.
Congratulations! What do you do?

turns.cn: 在一家科技公司做产品经理。
turns.en: I'm a product manager at a tech company.

turns.cn: 太棒了！要不要再点一杯？
turns.en: That's awesome! Want another round?

title: Chain 7/8: Who Pays
scene: 聊完准备走，朋友说要请客。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 今天我请，你上次帮了大忙。
turns.en: My treat today. You helped me out last time.
You don't have to. We can split it.
Don't argue. You get the next one.
Okay. Thanks.
Next time let's try that new place.
Deal.

title: Chain 8/8: Leave and Review
scene: 离开前你跟店员道别，打算写评价。（对话链：咖啡馆）

turns.cn: 今天打扰久了，谢谢换燕麦奶那杯。
turns.en: Sorry for staying so long. Thanks for remaking the oat milk latte.
No problem. Come back anytime.

turns.cn: 插座和 Wi-Fi 都很棒，我会写好评。
turns.en: Great outlets and Wi-Fi. I'll leave a good review.
Thank you! See you tomorrow.
See you tomorrow.
